---
title: "Species index — A–Z (by common name)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

[View A–Z by scientific name](/trees/genus/index2.html)

# Species index (A–Z)

## A

- [Almond](/trees/species/almond.html) — [*Prunus dulcis*](/trees/species/almond.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Apple Evereste](/trees/species/apple-evereste.html) — [*Malus*](/trees/species/apple-evereste.html) — Genus: [Malus](/trees/genus/malus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Ash](/trees/species/ash.html) — [*Fraxinus excelsior*](/trees/species/ash.html) — Genus: [Fraxinus](/trees/genus/fraxinus.html) — Family: [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)
- [Aspen](/trees/species/aspen.html) — [*Populus tremula*](/trees/species/aspen.html) — Genus: [Populus](/trees/genus/populus.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)

## B

- [Beech](/trees/species/beech.html) — [*Fagus sylvatica*](/trees/species/beech.html) — Genus: [Fagus](/trees/genus/fagus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Bird Cherry](/trees/species/bird-cherry.html) — [*Prunus padus*](/trees/species/bird-cherry.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Black Alder](/trees/species/black-alder.html) — [*Alnus glutinosa*](/trees/species/black-alder.html) — Genus: [Alnus](/trees/genus/alnus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [Black Pine](/trees/species/black-pine.html) — [*Pinus nigra*](/trees/species/black-pine.html) — Genus: [Pinus](/trees/genus/pinus.html) — Family: [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)
- [Black Poplar](/trees/species/black-poplar.html) — [*Populus nigra betulifolia*](/trees/species/black-poplar.html) — Genus: [Populus](/trees/genus/populus.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)
- [Buckthorn](/trees/species/buckthorn.html) — [*Rhamnus cathartica*](/trees/species/buckthorn.html) — Genus: [Rhamnus](/trees/genus/rhamnus.html) — Family: [Rhamnaceae](/trees/family/rhamnaceae.html)

## C

- [Common Hawthorn](/trees/species/common-hawthorn.html) — [*Crataegus monogyna*](/trees/species/common-hawthorn.html) — Genus: [Crataegus](/trees/genus/crataegus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Cork Oak](/trees/species/cork-oak.html) — [*Quercus suber*](/trees/species/cork-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Crab Apple](/trees/species/crab-apple.html) — [*Malus sylvestris*](/trees/species/crab-apple.html) — Genus: [Malus](/trees/genus/malus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Crack Willow](/trees/species/crack-willow.html) — [*Salix fragilis*](/trees/species/crack-willow.html) — Genus: [Salix](/trees/genus/salix.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)

## D

- [Downy Birch](/trees/species/downy-birch.html) — [*Betula pubescens*](/trees/species/downy-birch.html) — Genus: [Betula](/trees/genus/betula.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## E

- [Elder](/trees/species/elder.html) — [*Sambucus nigra*](/trees/species/elder.html) — Genus: [Sambucus](/trees/genus/sambucus.html) — Family: [Adoxaceae](/trees/family/adoxaceae.html)
- [English Oak](/trees/species/english-oak.html) — [*Quercus robur*](/trees/species/english-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [English Walnut](/trees/species/english-walnut.html) — [*Juglans regia*](/trees/species/english-walnut.html) — Genus: [Juglans](/trees/genus/juglans.html) — Family: [Juglandaceae](/trees/family/juglandaceae.html)

## F

- [Field Maple](/trees/species/field-maple.html) — [*Acer campestre*](/trees/species/field-maple.html) — Genus: [Acer](/trees/genus/acer.html) — Family: [Sapindaceae](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html)
- [Fig](/trees/species/fig.html) — [*Ficus carica*](/trees/species/fig.html) — Genus: [Ficus](/trees/genus/ficus.html) — Family: [Moraceae](/trees/family/moraceae.html)
- [Fruitless Mulberry](/trees/species/fruitless-mulberry.html) — [*Morus alba*](/trees/species/fruitless-mulberry.html) — Genus: [Morus](/trees/genus/morus.html) — Family: [Moraceae](/trees/family/moraceae.html)

## G

- [Goat Willow](/trees/species/goat-willow.html) — [*Salix caprea*](/trees/species/goat-willow.html) — Genus: [Salix](/trees/genus/salix.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)
- [Grey Alder](/trees/species/grey-alder.html) — [*Alnus incana*](/trees/species/grey-alder.html) — Genus: [Alnus](/trees/genus/alnus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## H

- [Hazel](/trees/species/hazel.html) — [*Corylus avellana*](/trees/species/hazel.html) — Genus: [Corylus](/trees/genus/corylus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [Holly](/trees/species/holly.html) — [*Ilex aquifolium*](/trees/species/holly.html) — Genus: [Ilex](/trees/genus/ilex.html) — Family: [Aquifoliaceae](/trees/family/aquifoliaceae.html)
- [Holm Oak](/trees/species/holm-oak.html) — [*Quercus ilex*](/trees/species/holm-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Hornbeam](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) — [*Carpinus betulus*](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) — Genus: [Carpinus](/trees/genus/carpinus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## L

- [Lilac](/trees/species/lilac.html) — [*Syringa vulgaris*](/trees/species/lilac.html) — Genus: [Syringa](/trees/genus/syringa.html) — Family: [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)
- [London Plane](/trees/species/london-plane.html) — [*Platanus × hispanica*](/trees/species/london-plane.html) — Genus: [Platanus](/trees/genus/platanus.html) — Family: [Platanaceae](/trees/family/platanaceae.html)

## O

- [Olive](/trees/species/olive.html) — [*Olea europaea*](/trees/species/olive.html) — Genus: [Olea](/trees/genus/olea.html) — Family: [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)
- [Oriental Plane](/trees/species/oriental-plane.html) — [*Platanus orientalis*](/trees/species/oriental-plane.html) — Genus: [Platanus](/trees/genus/platanus.html) — Family: [Platanaceae](/trees/family/platanaceae.html)

## P

- [Pear Beech Hill](/trees/species/pear-Beech-Hill.html) — [*Pyrus communis*](/trees/species/pear-Beech-Hill.html) — Genus: [Pyrus](/trees/genus/pyrus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Pear Beech Hill](/trees/species/pear-beech-hill.html) — [*Pyrus communis*](/trees/species/pear-beech-hill.html) — Genus: [Pyrus](/trees/genus/pyrus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Persimmon](/trees/species/persimmon.html) — [*Diospyros kaki*](/trees/species/persimmon.html) — Genus: [Diospyros](/trees/genus/diospyros.html) — Family: [Ebenaceae](/trees/family/ebenaceae.html)

## Q

- [Quince](/trees/species/quince.html) — [*Cydonia oblonga*](/trees/species/quince.html) — Genus: [Cydonia](/trees/genus/cydonia.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## R

- [Rowan](/trees/species/rowan.html) — [*Sorbus aucuparia*](/trees/species/rowan.html) — Genus: [Sorbus](/trees/genus/sorbus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## S

- [Sessile Oak](/trees/species/sessile-oak.html) — [*Quercus petraea*](/trees/species/sessile-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Silver Birch](/trees/species/silver-birch.html) — [*Betula pendula*](/trees/species/silver-birch.html) — Genus: [Betula](/trees/genus/betula.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [Soft Tree Fern](/trees/species/soft-tree-fern.html) — [*Dicksonia antarctica*](/trees/species/soft-tree-fern.html) — Genus: [Dicksonia](/trees/genus/dicksonia.html) — Family: [Dicksoniaceae](/trees/family/dicksoniaceae.html)
- [Sour Cherry](/trees/species/sour-cherry.html) — [*Prunus cerasus*](/trees/species/sour-cherry.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Spindle](/trees/species/spindle.html) — [*Euonymus europaeus*](/trees/species/spindle.html) — Genus: [Euonymus](/trees/genus/euonymus.html) — Family: [Celastraceae](/trees/family/celastraceae.html)
- [Stone Pine](/trees/species/stone-pine.html) — [*Pinus pinea*](/trees/species/stone-pine.html) — Genus: [Pinus](/trees/genus/pinus.html) — Family: [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)
- [Sweet Cherry](/trees/species/sweet-cherry.html) — [*Prunus avium*](/trees/species/sweet-cherry.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Sweet Chestnut](/trees/species/sweet-chestnut.html) — [*Castanea sativa*](/trees/species/sweet-chestnut.html) — Genus: [Castanea](/trees/genus/castanea.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Sycamore Maple](/trees/species/sycamore-maple.html) — [*Acer pseudoplatanus*](/trees/species/sycamore-maple.html) — Genus: [Acer](/trees/genus/acer.html) — Family: [Sapindaceae](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html)

## W

- [Weeping Silver Lime](/trees/species/weeping-silver-lime.html) — [*Tilia tomentosa*](/trees/species/weeping-silver-lime.html) — Genus: [Tilia](/trees/genus/tilia.html) — Family: [Malvaceae](/trees/family/malvaceae.html)
- [White Birch](/trees/species/white-birch.html) — [*Betula alba*](/trees/species/white-birch.html) — Genus: [Betula](/trees/genus/betula.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [Whitebeam](/trees/species/whitebeam.html) — [*Sorbus aria*](/trees/species/whitebeam.html) — Genus: [Sorbus](/trees/genus/sorbus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## Y

- [Yew](/trees/species/yew.html) — [*Taxus baccata*](/trees/species/yew.html) — Genus: [Taxus](/trees/genus/taxus.html) — Family: [Taxaceae](/trees/family/taxaceae.html)
